statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); used_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // 0'); total_input=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens // 0'); total_output=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_output_tokens // 0'); total_tokens=$((total_input + total_output)); bar_width=20; filled=$((used_pct * bar_width / 100)); empty=$((bar_width - filled)); bar="["; for ((i=0; i<filled; i++)); do bar+="█"; done; for ((i=0; i<empty; i++)); do bar+="░"; done; bar+="]"; color=""; if [ "$used_pct" -ge 90 ]; then color="$(printf '\033[31m')"; elif [ "$used_pct" -ge 70 ]; then color="$(printf '\033[33m')"; else color="$(printf '\033[32m')"; fi; printf "$(printf '\033[36m')%s$(printf '\033[0m') $(printf '\033[90m')│$(printf '\033[0m') Context: %s%s %d%%$(printf '\033[0m') $(printf '\033[90m')│$(printf '\033[0m') $(printf '\033[35m')%s tokens$(printf '\033[0m') $(printf '\033[90m')│$(printf '\033[0m') $(printf '\033[34m')%s$(printf '\033[0m')" "$model" "$color" "$bar" "$used_pct" "$total_tokens" "$cwd"
